name: Frozen Lemon Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Graham cracker crumbs or vanilla wafer crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, mix egg yolks, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest until thick.
- Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Once cooled, beat egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
- Beat cream until it becomes stiff.
3. Gently fold the beaten egg whites and whipped cream into the custard mixture.
4. Sprinkle half of the crumbs evenly onto the bottom of a springform pan.
5. Add the dessert mixture to the pan.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crumbs over the top.
7. Freeze until firm.
Suggestions: The cake can be enjoyed on its own or topped with a spoonful of syrupy strawberries when served!
